checks.pass_condition: After a contiguous sequence of eight cycles where din_valid is asserted, dout_parallel must equal the eight transmitted din_serial bits with the first received bit placed in the most‑significant position (dout_parallel[7]) and the last received bit in the least‑significant position (dout_parallel[0]); dout_valid must be high. When din_valid is low or fewer than eight valid bits have been collected, dout_valid must be low and dout_parallel must retain its previous value.
checks.trigger_condition: When a sequence of eight consecutive din_valid‑asserted cycles is observed.
